dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal detects Friday weakness after multi-day deterioration. Entry conditions: Friday close in lower 25% of range (price_pos_20 < 0.25) AND close below support level (s1). Short position captures downside hedge with 3% position size. Exit on Monday rally above Friday close (invalidates thesis) or 2-hour window + 2-day hold max. Prior day deterioration not directly expressible but captured by support test. Regime set to TRENDING_DOWN as signal is bearish continuation play.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal detects Friday weakness after multi-day deterioration. Entry conditions: Friday close in lower 25% of range (price_pos_20 < 0.25) AND close below support level (s1). Short position captures downside hedge with 3% position size. Exit on Monday rally above Friday close (invalidates thesis) or 2-hour window + 2-day hold max. Prior day deterioration not directly expressible but captured by support test. Regime set to TRENDING_DOWN as signal is bearish continuation play.

source_rule_text: A trader should use Friday's market action as a predictive signal for Monday's opening direction and magnitude, and hedge downside risk when Friday confirms weakness after prior days of deterioration.
